ja-jp: ペーパーカットアウト
輝度から自動生成する紙の階層数を指定します。
en-us: Sets how many paper layers are generated automatically from luminance.
zh-cn: Sets how many paper layers are generated automatically from luminance.
zh-tw: Sets how many paper layers are generated automatically from luminance.
ko-kr: Sets how many paper layers are generated automatically from luminance.
es-es: Sets how many paper layers are generated automatically from luminance.
ar-sa: Sets how many paper layers are generated automatically from luminance.
id-id: Sets how many paper layers are generated automatically from luminance.

ja-jp: 階層境界に落とす影の距離をpxで指定します。
en-us: Sets the shadow distance at layer boundaries in pixels.
zh-cn: Sets the shadow distance at layer boundaries in pixels.
zh-tw: Sets the shadow distance at layer boundaries in pixels.
ko-kr: Sets the shadow distance at layer boundaries in pixels.
es-es: Sets the shadow distance at layer boundaries in pixels.
ar-sa: Sets the shadow distance at layer boundaries in pixels.
id-id: Sets the shadow distance at layer boundaries in pixels.

ja-jp: 紙の段差で発生する影の強さを調整します。
en-us: Adjusts shadow strength created by paper height differences.
zh-cn: Adjusts shadow strength created by paper height differences.
zh-tw: Adjusts shadow strength created by paper height differences.
ko-kr: Adjusts shadow strength created by paper height differences.
es-es: Adjusts shadow strength created by paper height differences.
ar-sa: Adjusts shadow strength created by paper height differences.
id-id: Adjusts shadow strength created by paper height differences.

ja-jp: 切り口の明暗差と立体感を調整します。
en-us: Adjusts brightness contrast and relief around cut edges.
zh-cn: Adjusts brightness contrast and relief around cut edges.
zh-tw: Adjusts brightness contrast and relief around cut edges.
ko-kr: Adjusts brightness contrast and relief around cut edges.
es-es: Adjusts brightness contrast and relief around cut edges.
ar-sa: Adjusts brightness contrast and relief around cut edges.
id-id: Adjusts brightness contrast and relief around cut edges.

ja-jp: 紙の繊維状のざらつきを調整します。
影とハイライトの向きを角度で指定します。
en-us: Sets the direction of shadows and highlights in degrees.
zh-cn: Sets the direction of shadows and highlights in degrees.
zh-tw: Sets the direction of shadows and highlights in degrees.
ko-kr: Sets the direction of shadows and highlights in degrees.
es-es: Sets the direction of shadows and highlights in degrees.
ar-sa: Sets the direction of shadows and highlights in degrees.
id-id: Sets the direction of shadows and highlights in degrees.

ja-jp: 元画像の色を残す割合を調整します。
en-us: Adjusts how much of the source image color remains.
zh-cn: Adjusts how much of the source image color remains.
zh-tw: Adjusts how much of the source image color remains.
ko-kr: Adjusts how much of the source image color remains.
es-es: Adjusts how much of the source image color remains.
ar-sa: Adjusts how much of the source image color remains.
id-id: Adjusts how much of the source image color remains.

ja-jp: 紙として混ぜ込む基準色を指定します。
en-us: Sets the base color blended in as paper.
zh-cn: Sets the base color blended in as paper.
zh-tw: Sets the base color blended in as paper.
ko-kr: Sets the base color blended in as paper.
es-es: Sets the base color blended in as paper.
ar-sa: Sets the base color blended in as paper.
id-id: Sets the base color blended in as paper.

ja-jp: 元画像とペーパーカットアウト結果の混合量を調整します。
en-us: Adjusts the blend between the source image and the paper cutout result.
zh-cn: Adjusts the blend between the source image and the paper cutout result.
zh-tw: Adjusts the blend between the source image and the paper cutout result.
ko-kr: Adjusts the blend between the source image and the paper cutout result.
es-es: Adjusts the blend between the source image and the paper cutout result.
ar-sa: Adjusts the blend between the source image and the paper cutout result.
id-id: Adjusts the blend between the source image and the paper cutout result.
